# DS Racing Karts

> Go kart parts, engines, chassis and expert race servicing in Sydney, Australia.
> Online store shipping Australia-wide. Workshop in Woodbine, NSW (by appointment only).

DS Racing Karts is an Australian karting specialist supplying parts and service for
racing go karts: Rotax, Honda GX, Briggs & Stratton LO206, Torini, Tillotson, CRG and
more. Designers and builders of the DSR Predator, a purpose-built 4-stroke twin-engine
endurance chassis. Active in Australian endurance karting (ERC, SEK, TEKA).

## Key pages

- [Shop](https://dsracingkarts.com.au/shop): Full online catalogue — chassis, engines, brakes, bearings, chains, sprockets, wheels, racewear and accessories
- [Pre-Loved Chassis](https://dsracingkarts.com.au/predator-chassis): Second-hand and DSR Predator chassis
- [Services](https://dsracingkarts.com.au/our-services): Kart servicing, engine tuning, chassis repair and race support
- [About](https://dsracingkarts.com.au/about-us): Business background and the DSR Predator story
- [Shipping & Returns](https://dsracingkarts.com.au/shipping-returns): Australia-wide shipping policy, 14-day returns, refunds
- [Contact](https://dsracingkarts.com.au/contact): Phone 0492 454 854, dsracing@bigpond.com, Woodbine NSW

## Facts

- Location: Long Reef Crescent, Woodbine, NSW, Australia (appointment only)
- Shipping: Australia-wide; dispatch 1-2 business days; supplier-sourced items typically within 24-48 hours
- Payments: Square (major credit/debit cards), prices in AUD including GST
- Returns: 14 days, unused and in original packaging; Australian Consumer Law applies
